svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="ZG0nwj-o2XHJ978z8_6G" name="第 1 页"> <mxGraphModel dx="1228" dy="895" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1200" pageHeight="700" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;arcSize=20;" value="客户端类型判断" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="200" x="460" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" edge="1" parent="1" source="2" style="endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;" target="4" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;arcSize=12;" value="公开客户端
(浏览器 / 移动端)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="220" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" edge="1" parent="1" source="2" style="endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;" target="6" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;arcSize=12;" value="机密客户端
(服务端)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="720" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" edge="1" parent="1" source="4" style="endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;" target="8" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;arcSize=10;" value="Authorization Code
+ PKCE" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="210" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" edge="1" parent="1" source="6" style="endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;" target="10" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;arcSize=10;" value="Client Credentials" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="710" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" parent="1" style="text;fontSize=12;fontColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" value="安全等级：高" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="100" x="260" y="385" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" parent="1" style="text;fontSize=11;fontColor=#666666;" value="适用：SPA、移动端" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="120" x="260" y="405" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="13" parent="1" style="text;fontSize=12;fontColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" value="安全等级：高" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="100" x="760" y="385" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="14" parent="1" style="text;fontSize=11;fontColor=#666666;" value="适用：服务间调用" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="120" x="760" y="405" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="15" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#999999;fontSize=14;fontStyle=3;dashed=1;dashPattern=5 5;arcSize=8;" value="OAuth 2.1 已废弃" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="420" x="350" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="16" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#cccccc;fontSize=13;fontStyle=2;arcSize=10;" value="Implicit Grant" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="170" x="370" y="540" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="17" parent="1" style="text;fontSize=11;fontColor=#999999;" value="安全等级：低" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="100" x="390" y="580" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="18" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#cccccc;fontSize=13;fontStyle=2;arcSize=10;" value="Password Grant" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="170" x="580" y="540" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="19" parent="1" style="text;fontSize=11;fontColor=#999999;" value="安全等级：低" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="100" x="600" y="580" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="20" parent="1" style="text;fontSize=11;fontColor=#6c8ebf;align=center;" value="公开客户端" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="80" x="270" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="21" parent="1" style="text;fontSize=11;fontColor=#6c8ebf;align=center;" value="机密客户端" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="80" x="770" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
